Code2Video is a Python-based framework that generates educational videos directly from code. It leverages a multi-agent approach to transform code into visual explanations, aiming to simplify the creation of learning content.

AdbPad is a cross-platform GUI application for Windows and macOS that simplifies Android app testing by providing a user-friendly interface for executing ADB commands, managing connected devices, sending text input, capturing screenshots, and creating virtual displays.

𝗠𝗖𝗣-𝗧𝗢𝗢𝗟𝗕𝗢𝗫 | To enable AI agents and applications to interact with and query enterprise databases through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), offering both out-of-the-box functionality and a platform for custom tool development.  🌟 Rising Fast!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable AI agents and applications to interact with and query enterprise databases through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), offering both out-of-the-box functionality and a platform for custom tool development.
📅 Created: Jun 2024 • Updated: May 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source MCP server for databases
✅ Connects AI agents, IDEs, and applications to enterprise databases
✅ Prebuilt generic tools for instant data exploration (e.g., list_tables, execute_sql)
✅ Custom tools framework for building specialized, secure AI tools
✅ Supports NL2SQL capabilities
✅ Provides SDKs for Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, and Java


✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

🍴 1.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 139 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

MCP Toolbox for Databases is an open-source Go-based server that bridges AI agents, IDEs, and applications with enterprise databases. It offers both a ready-to-use MCP server with prebuilt tools for immediate data interaction and a framework for building custom, secure AI tools with specific logic.

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enhance and automate the code review process for critical Linux-based system projects using AI.
📅 Created: Sep 2025 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-assisted code review prompts
✅ Specialized prompts for Linux kernel, systemd, and iproute
✅ Integration with AI tools (e.g., Claude Code)
✅ Quick start installation script
✅ Slash commands for review, debug, and verify workflows
✅ Context-aware skill loading based on working directory
✅ Semcode integration for enhanced code navigation

This repository provides AI-assisted code review prompts specifically tailored for Linux kernel, systemd, and iproute development. It integrates with AI tools like Claude Code and offers specialized commands for reviewing, debugging, and verifying code within these projects.

𝗡𝗔𝗡𝗢𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗧 | To provide an accessible and cost-effective platform for researchers and developers to train, experiment with, and deploy Large Language Models, particularly focusing on achieving GPT-2 level capabilities on minimal hardware.  🌟 Rising Fast!

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an accessible and cost-effective platform for researchers and developers to train, experiment with, and deploy Large Language Models, particularly focusing on achieving GPT-2 level capabilities on minimal hardware.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: May 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Minimalist and hackable codebase for LLM training
✅ Supports full LLM lifecycle: tokenization, pretraining, finetuning, evaluation, inference
✅ Includes a ChatGPT-like web UI for interaction
✅ Enables training GPT-2 capability models for under $100 on a single GPU node
✅ Automated hyperparameter calculation for compute-optimal models
✅ Time-to-GPT-2 leaderboard for tracking training speed and efficiency
✅ Dependency management using uv for streamlined setup


❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 53K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 7.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 17 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

nanochat is a minimalist and hackable Python framework for training and experimenting with Large Language Models (LLMs) on a single GPU. It covers the full LLM lifecycle from tokenization to inference and includes a ChatGPT-like UI, enabling users to train models like GPT-2 for a fraction of the original cost.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

qui is a fast, single-binary web UI for qBittorrent, designed to manage multiple qBittorrent instances efficiently. It offers features like cross-seeding, automated torrent workflows, and backups, all accessible through a responsive interface.
